title: Content Marketing Associate
description: Capital One is looking for a Content Marketing Associate to create compelling financial education content and marketing materials from our Kansas City headquarters. You'll help drive brand awareness and customer engagement by producing blog posts, guides, and digital assets. Working within our Marketing organization, you'll support campaigns that resonate with our diverse customer base, learning financial services marketing in a Fortune 500 environment.
responsibilities: Create engaging blog posts, whitepapers, and guides on financial topics tailored to customer segments and personas
Develop marketing copy for digital campaigns, email, and website that drive engagement and conversions
Conduct keyword research and optimize content for search engines to increase organic visibility
Collaborate with product marketing and design teams to ensure consistent messaging across channels
Track content performance through analytics and provide insights to improve strategy and results

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, English, or related field
